build.beforeBuildCommand: bazelisk build //frankweiler/backend/http:frankweiler_http_bin //frankweiler/backend/sync:frankweiler_sync_bin //frankweiler/backend/etl:latchkey_curl_shim && d="$(bazelisk info workspace)/frankweiler/tauri/binaries" && b="$(bazelisk info bazel-bin)" && mkdir -p "$d" && cp -f "$b/frankweiler/backend/http/frankweiler_http_bin" "$d/frankweiler-http" && cp -f "$b/frankweiler/backend/sync/frankweiler_sync_bin" "$d/frankweiler-sync" && cp -f "$b/frankweiler/backend/etl/latchkey_curl_shim" "$d/latchkey-curl-shim" && chmod u+w "$d/frankweiler-http" "$d/frankweiler-sync" "$d/latchkey-curl-shim" && { [ -z "${APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY:-}" ] || codesign --force --options runtime --timestamp --sign "$APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY" "$d/frankweiler-http" "$d/frankweiler-sync" "$d/latchkey-curl-shim"; } && bash "$(bazelisk info workspace)/frankweiler/tauri/stage-runtime.sh"
